_note: Phase-1 research output for the 2026-07-23 gap-analysis task (hesder yeshivot / mechinot / Anglo women's gap-year seminaries), updated 2026-07-23 after import. Existing DB coverage was already extensive going in (57 hesder-tagged, 88 mechina-tagged, 79 girls-only gap-year-tagged programs) -- these are NOT underrepresented categories in the way the task brief assumed; see the chat report for the full data-quality finding. 6 candidates survived the 'must have an independently-hosted official website, not just an aggregator/union-directory listing' bar. One of those 6 -- Hevruta (Shalom Hartman Institute) -- turned out to already exist in the DB as 'Hevruta Gap-Year Program' [hevruta-gap-year-program], caught on a pre-import re-check and excluded. The remaining 5 (3 hesder + 2 mechinot) were imported into production via prisma/import-researched.ts on 2026-07-23 -- see the chat report for the row IDs/slugs and tag-attachment confirmation. Tags are given as exact Tag.name strings (not slugs) for resolveTagsByName. contactEmail was never populated (none observed) per lib/importGuards.ts. Extra fields beyond the ResearchedProgram type (hebrewName, goodFor, hasScholarship, hasCollegeCredit) were ignored by import-researched.ts itself -- carry them into good-for.json / facet-tags-by-slug.json by hand in a future enrichment pass. A further 9 real, named candidates were identified but EXCLUDED here for lacking a verifiable independent website (Yeshivat Binot Ra'anana, Yeshivat Hesder Ma'ale Efraim, Beth Jacob Jerusalem/BJJ, Bais Yaakov Mesores Rivka, Lahav Bais Yaakov, Keser Chaya, Hadar Bais Yaakov, Mesores Rochel, Tehilas Bais Yaakov) -- see chat report. One candidate (Midreshet Emunah v'Omanut) was found to be DEFUNCT (closed June 2023) and is deliberately omitted.

hesder_yeshivot.name: Yeshivat Heichal Eliyahu (Kochav Yaakov)
hesder_yeshivot.description: A hesder yeshiva in Kochav Yaakov, in the Binyamin region near Jerusalem, tracing its roots to a yeshiva founded in Montreux, Switzerland in 1927 before relocating to Israel and adopting the hesder framework in 1985. Currently led by Rabbi Shaul David Butchko, it offers three tracks -- hesder, a combined shiluvim track, and a higher-level kollel track -- combining Torah study with IDF service.
hesder_yeshivot.goodFor: Hebrew-speaking Israeli young men seeking a hesder framework; the yeshiva's own site is Hebrew-only, with no dedicated overseas/English program found.
hesder_yeshivot.adminNote: New candidate, not in the DB's existing 57 hesder-tagged programs. Found via the official Igud Yeshivot HaHesder (hesder.org.il) member directory. Independent official site confirmed live at yhe-ky.com (redirects from toraisrael.com). Exact program length, cost, signup process, and phone were not found/confirmed -- left blank rather than guessed. 'Boys only' tag reflects the categorical nature of hesder yeshivot (a men's IDF-linked framework), not an explicit statement on this yeshiva's own site -- verify before publishing if that distinction matters.

hesder_yeshivot.name: Yeshivat Lev Tel Aviv – Shir Le'Neriya
hesder_yeshivot.hebrewName: ישיבת לב תל אביב – שיר לנריה
hesder_yeshivot.description: A hesder yeshiva in the heart of Tel Aviv (9 Herman Cohen Street), combining intensive Torah study with preparation for IDF service. Named Shir Le'Neriya in memory of Neriya Cohen, killed in a 2008 terror attack in Jerusalem, the yeshiva deliberately positions itself within the urban Tel Aviv environment -- rather than apart from it -- to build participants' connection to the land and people of Israel.
hesder_yeshivot.goodFor: Young religious men who want a hesder framework embedded in central Tel Aviv rather than a more insular or rural yeshiva setting.
hesder_yeshivot.adminNote: New candidate, not in the DB's existing 57 hesder-tagged programs. Found via the official hesder union directory. Official site recently moved from ylevtlv.z1.web.core.windows.net to ylevtlv.com -- redirect confirmed live. contactPhone (0544979748) is Rabbi Nir Yaakov's number per the Igud Yeshivot HaHesder directory, not independently confirmed on the yeshiva's own site. Cost, exact duration, and signup process were not found -- left blank rather than guessed. 'Boys only' tag reflects the categorical nature of hesder yeshivot, not an explicit statement on-site.

hesder_yeshivot.name: Yeshivat Nahariya (Nahar De'a)
hesder_yeshivot.description: A hesder yeshiva overlooking the Mediterranean and the western Galilee, founded in 1995 by Rabbi Yeshayahu Meitlis (Nahariya's city rabbi) and Rabbi Chaim Rateig. Around 90 students study there today under Rabbi Meitlis and Rabbi Moshe Adler, in a program built around three pillars: personal development, close-knit community, and practical volunteering and service.
hesder_yeshivot.goodFor: Young religious men, often graduates of religious high schools from across Israel, looking for a smaller, family-like hesder community in the north.
hesder_yeshivot.adminNote: New candidate, not in the DB's existing 57 hesder-tagged programs. Found via the official hesder union directory; independent official site (nahariya.co.il) confirmed live and cross-checked against the Hebrew Wikipedia infobox. Also referred to as 'Nahar De'a' in some listings -- same institution. Cost, exact duration, signup process, and phone were not found -- left blank rather than guessed. 'Boys only' tag reflects the categorical nature of hesder yeshivot, not an explicit statement on-site.

mechinot.name: Mechinat Ateret Yerushalayim
mechinot.description: A pre-military academy in Jerusalem's Old City, near the Western Wall -- one of the first mechinot established in Jerusalem and among the older ones in Israel nationally (marking roughly three decades in operation as of the mid-2020s). The program centers on character education, Torah study, and connection to the Jewish people and the land of Israel, based in the heart of the rebuilt Jewish Quarter.
mechinot.adminNote: New candidate, not in the DB's existing 88 mechina-tagged programs. Found via mechinot.org.il's official directory and confirmed on the mechina's own site (mechinat-ateret.co.il) plus a Srugim.co.il 30th-anniversary article. Distinct legal entity/site from the already-listed 'Yeshivat Ateret Yerushalayim' hesder yeshiva (also Old City) -- likely affiliated but not confirmed to be the same organization; flag for a dedup/relationship check. Gender/affiliation tags and goodFor deliberately left unset -- target audience is not stated on the program's own site and was not independently confirmed (likely young religious-Zionist men, given the Old City setting, but not verified). Cost, exact duration, and signup process were not found.

mechinot.name: Mechinat Maamakim
mechinot.description: A pre-military academy at Kibbutz Magen in the Eshkol Regional Council (western Negev, near the Gaza border), founded in 2023 by the Israeli Scouts movement (Tzofim) as its newest addition to the mechina landscape. The program is built around Scouting-movement values -- leadership, love of the land, democracy and equality, and social activism -- and presents itself as a deliberately new pre-military track for participants open to 'starting a new journey.'
mechinot.goodFor: Coed, secular or pluralistic young adults connected to or interested in the Scouts (Tzofim) movement's values-based approach; one of the newest mechinot in Israel (est. 2023).
mechinot.adminNote: New candidate, not in the DB's existing 88 mechina-tagged programs. Found via mechinot.org.il's official secular/general mechina list and independently confirmed via Israel Defense coverage and the mechina's own site (maamakym.com). Founded 2023, so still very new. Cost, exact duration, signup process, and phone were not found -- left blank rather than guessed.
